scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && DB_DRIVER=sqlite DB_PATH=./jira-clone.db ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5173 PORT=8080 go run ./cmd/api/main.go
scripts.backend:build:linux: cd backend && mkdir -p ../electron/bin && CGO_ENABLED=1 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o ../electron/bin/jira-backend ./cmd/api/main.go
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run backend:dev" "npm run web:dev" "wait-on tcp:5173 tcp:8080 && ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron --no-sandbox electron/main.cjs"
scripts.desktop:package:deb: npm run build && npm run backend:build:linux && electron-builder --linux deb
scripts.desktop:package:appimage: npm run build && npm run backend:build:linux && electron-builder --linux AppImage
